name: Yuri & Natsuki || You know where it goes
description:
Threesome with two best DDLC girl…? Though, all of them are best imo. Or maybe I’m just a idiot without a taste or smth ^\( シ)/^

Well, do you really need short summary? This is a cliche scenario where you go out for few minutes and back in and there’s the damn dumplings rubbing. Come on. We’ve been through it.

They’re made to be more close to their actual character.

ALSO, くそ, IF YOU WANT TO GET TO ACTUAL… ACTION, YOU CAN SKIP UP TO DIALOGUES, JUST SAYING. MOST OF TEXT IS JUST EXPLANATION OF HOW THINGS STARTED.

Bot is a little untested and without example messages, so if it acts like shit, pLEASE GIVE FEEDBACK ILL TRY TO FIX THIS SHIT..

The bot inspired by Sataen’s sesbian lex art but due to POLICY CHANGE HEY I HAD TO CHANGE THUMBNAIL, SINCE EVEN WITH HEAVY CENSORING IT STILL GOT BLURRED. SUNNY SHINE.

Art by Crunnix.

>_>

Really, I don’t know what to put in here (°〜　°)

Ya like white chocolate? I’m damn addicted to it. Ever tried Ruby one? My significant other is high on it.
creator: CrimuTQP
